# Glow Lab Protocols
> Premium research peptides and peptide blends — 99%+ purity, third-party tested. For research use only. Not for human consumption.

Glow Lab Protocols (https://glowlabprotocols.com) is an online store for research-grade peptides, blends, and topicals. Every batch is third-party tested for identity and purity and held to a 99%+ purity standard. Products ship as lyophilized powder, fast and discreet. Priority shipping is $15 and free on orders over $250.

## Research peptides (with sizes and prices, USD)
- BAC Water — 30 mL — $9.99 (diluent for reconstitution)
- MOTS-C — 10 mg — $34.00
- NAD+ — 500 mg — $49.99
- GHK-Cu — 100 mg — $37.99
- Tirzepatide — 10 mg — $41.99 / 20 mg — $78.00
- Retatrutide — 10 mg — $44.99 / 20 mg — $82.00
- KPV — 10 mg — $33.99
- Adamax — 5 mg — $48.00 / 10 mg — $58.99
- Glutathione — 750 mg — $37.33 / 1500 mg — $59.00
- DSIP — 5 mg — $32.00
- Thymosin Alpha-1 — 5 mg — $42.00
- Tesamorelin + Ipamorelin — 10 mg / 10 mg — $82.00
- KLOW blend (GHK-Cu, BPC-157, TB-500, KPV) — $86.99
- AICAR — 50 mg — $52.00
- 5-Amino-1MQ — 50 mg — $36.00
- SS-31 — 10 mg — $42.99
- PT-141 — 10 mg — $32.99
- Selank — 10 mg — $32.99
- BPC-157 — 5 mg — $32.00

## Skincare & topicals
- Glow Topicals: Protocol 01 (15 mL, $48), Protocol 02 (15 mL, $32)
- Rose Recovery Mist — 60 mL — $19.00
- Cu-Hair 01 — 30 mL — $42.00 / Cu-Hair 02 — 15 mL — $55.00

## Standards & policies
- 99%+ purity, third-party tested on every batch
- Lyophilized powder; store at -20 C; reconstitute with bacteriostatic water
- Discreet, fast shipping — free over $250
- RESEARCH USE ONLY. NOT FOR HUMAN CONSUMPTION.
